%%sql
CREATE OR REPLACE  VIEW vw_Appeal_event_curated_mipins 
AS
SELECT
    eventId
    ,caseReference
    ,eventType
    ,eventName
    ,eventStatus
    ,CAST(IsUrgent AS Boolean) AS IsUrgent
    ,CAST(eventPublished AS Boolean) AS eventPublished
    ,CAST(eventStartDateTime AS Timestamp) AS eventStartDateTime
    ,CAST(eventEndDateTime AS Timestamp)  AS eventEndDateTime
    ,CAST(NotificationOfSiteVisit AS Timestamp) AS NotificationOfSiteVisit
    ,addressLine1
    ,addressLine2
    ,addressTown
    ,addressCounty
    ,addressPostcode
    ,Migrated
    ,ODTSourceSystem
    ,SourceSystemID
    ,IngestionDate
    ,ValidTo
    ,RowID
    ,IsActive
FROM
    odw_harmonised_db.appeal_event   
WHERE
    ODTSourceSystem = 'ODT'
AND (eventStartDateTime IS NULL OR eventStartDateTime >= TIMESTAMP('1900-01-01'))
AND (eventEndDateTime IS NULL OR eventEndDateTime >= TIMESTAMP('1900-01-01'))
AND (NotificationOfSiteVisit IS NULL OR NotificationOfSiteVisit >= TIMESTAMP('1900-01-01'))
AND (IngestionDate IS NULL OR IngestionDate >= TIMESTAMP('1900-01-01'))
AND (ValidTo IS NULL OR ValidTo >= TIMESTAMP('1900-01-01'))

from notebookutils import mssparkutils

spark.sql(
    "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS odw_curated_db.appeal_event_curated_mipins"
)

df = spark.sql("""
    SELECT
        eventId,
        caseReference,
        eventType,
        eventName,
        eventStatus,
        isUrgent,
        eventPublished,
        eventStartDateTime,
        eventEndDateTime,
        NotificationOfSiteVisit,
        addressLine1,
        addressLine2,
        addressTown,
        addressCounty,
        addressPostcode,
        Migrated,
        ODTSourceSystem,
        SourceSystemID,
        IngestionDate,
        ValidTo,
        RowID,
        IsActive
    FROM vw_Appeal_event_curated_mipins
""")

storage_account = mssparkutils.notebook.run(
    "/utils/py_utils_get_storage_account"
)

curated_container = f"abfss://odw-curated@{storage_account}"
target_path = f"{curated_container}/appeal_event_curated_mipins"

df.write \
    .mode("overwrite") \
    .format("delta") \
    .save(target_path)

spark.sql(f"""
    CREATE TABLE odw_curated_db.appeal_event_curated_mipins
    USING delta
    LOCATION '{target_path}'
